title: Instant Replay
description: Forgot to record? No problem. Save your recent gameplay with the click of a button.
body:
**Hate the feeling of realising you forgot to record whilst playing Minecraft?**

No worries, Instant Replay can fix that. With Instant Replay you can save up to 30 minutes of your recent gameplay with the click of a button. 

Your saved replays are fully compatible with Replay Mod and are directly saved to the same place where normal replays are. Because of this, I recommend that you use Replay Mod if you are going to use this mod. Since without Replay Mod, you can't access your saved replays.

To save an instant replay, press F8, it will save your replay and you can play it back in Replay Mod's replay viewer. Instant replay files are saved like this "Instant_Replay_Year_Month_Day_Hour_Minute_Second"

To change the amount of time an instant replay saves, you can press F6 to toggle the time.
The following time invertals are:
- 1 Minute
- 2 Minutes
- 3 Minutes
- 5 Minutes 
- 10 Minutes
- 30 Minutes

# Disclaimer:
In testing, this mod caused crashes and many issues. I have tried my best to prevent these issues in regular gameplay. However there may still be bugs and issues. 
Please report these bugs to me, by dming me on discord and I will try my best to fix them.

**My discord:**
- jacobxny 

# Dependencies:
- Fabric API: [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
### Recommended:
- Replay Mod: [Replay Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod)
